issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect; the card trashes Characters from the board (in play), not from hand. Should be 'KO' or a board trash action.
maxPower should be 999999 to allow 6000+, but the condition requires 'power or more': minPower should be 6000, not maxPower constraint.
Missing minPower:6000 to enforce the '6000 power or more' requirement.
PlayFromHand is incorrect; the card is played from trash, not hand. Should be 'PlaySelf' or equivalent trash-play action.
maxPower:5000 is correct for '2000 to 5000 power' upper bound, but minPower:2000 is missing.
Missing 'rested' keyword application. Card should be played rested; need GiveKeyword or rested property.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 of your Characters with 6000 power or more: Play up to 1 {FILM} type Character card with 2000 to 5000 power from your trash rested.
